isolation.viewport: 375x812 for user pages, 1280x800 for admin pages

VAL-CROSS-011.evidence: All browse pages (Goods /, Football /football, Basketball /basketball, Concert /concert) loaded successfully at 375x812 with product/event cards showing images, team names, dates, prices, and listing intelligence labels (Best Value, Selling Fast, Verified Listing, Only X left). Clicked product card navigated to /products/product-stable-005 with full detail page (name, price, availability, description, trust badges, CTAs). Clicked football event navigated to /events/event-stable-001 with full event details (teams, date, venue, price, availability, badges, CTAs). Back navigation returned to /football correctly. No console errors detected.

steps.expected: Products load with images, prices, intelligence labels
steps.observed: Products loaded with jersey images, prices ($28.99-$34.99), and labels (Best Value, Selling Fast, Verified Listing, Only 7 left)

steps.expected: Event cards with team names, dates, prices
steps.observed: 4 football events loaded with flags, team names, dates, venues, prices, and trust badges

steps.expected: Event cards with team names, dates, prices
steps.observed: Basketball events loaded with team names, dates, venues, prices, and trust badges

steps.expected: Event cards with artist names, dates, prices
steps.observed: Concert events loaded with artist names, dates, venues, and prices

steps.action: Click USA National Team Jersey product card
steps.expected: Detail page loads with product info
steps.observed: Navigated to /products/product-stable-005 with name, $28.99 price, 60 units remaining, description, Best Value label, Buyer Protection and Secure Delivery badges

steps.action: Click Jordan VS Argentina event card from football
steps.expected: Detail page loads with event info
steps.observed: Navigated to /events/event-stable-001 with team flags, date (Jun 16, 2026), venue, $89.99 price, 2500 tickets, Selling Fast/Verified badges, Delivery & Timing info
Returned to /football with events still displayed

VAL-CROSS-012.evidence: Logged in as test@example.com: Account landing (/my) loaded with user profile, stats (Balance $35,640, Shares 300, Points 3240), and navigation menu (My Tickets, My Listings, Order record). Order history (/my/orders) loaded with 2 orders showing item details, prices, quantities, statuses (To be paid, Paid), order numbers, and dates. My Tickets (/my/tickets) loaded with owned assets showing statuses (Pending, Confirmed, Listed for Sale), reference numbers, purchase dates, quantities. My Listings (/my/listings) loaded with listings showing statuses (Draft, Pending Sale, Active), reference numbers, listed dates, values. Logged in as admin@example.com: Admin dashboard (/admin/dashboard) loaded with stats (4 Users, 6 Products, 12 Events, 2 Orders, 5 Owned Assets, 5 Listings) and quick actions. Admin orders (/admin/orders) loaded with order table showing order numbers, user emails, item names, prices, quantities, statuses, dates, and status filter. No console errors detected.

steps.observed: Loaded with user profile (test@example.com, VIP 2), stats, and menu items
Loaded with 2 orders (Phoenix Suns VS Los Angeles Lakers, Argentina Home Jersey 2026) with statuses, prices, quantities

steps.expected: My Tickets loads with owned assets
steps.observed: Loaded with multiple owned assets showing Pending/Confirmed/Listed for Sale statuses, reference numbers, dates
Loaded with multiple listings showing Draft/Pending Sale/Active statuses, reference numbers, dates, values

steps.action: Clear cookies and login as admin@example.com
steps.observed: Logged in as admin, redirected to /
Dashboard loaded with Total Users: 4, Products: 6, Events: 12, Orders: 2, Owned Assets: 5, Listings: 5, plus Quick Actions

steps.expected: Admin orders page loads with data
steps.observed: Order Management page loaded with 2 orders showing full details, status badges, and status filter dropdown

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-CROSS-011 (browse regression) confirmed all listing pages (Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert) load correctly with product/event data, listing intelligence labels, and trust badges at 375x812 mobile viewport. Detail page navigation and back navigation work correctly. VAL-CROSS-012 (account/admin regression) confirmed account landing, order history, My Tickets, My Listings all load with populated data for test user, and admin dashboard and order management load with correct stats and data for admin user.
